================================================================================
function_call
================================================================================
a=
  b(1)
a={
  b=someFunc(
  b,
    1,
    a
    )
    }
c= 10
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (function_call_pnc_expr
        caller: (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        args: (const
          (int)))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (body_expression
        (value_declaration
          (decl_left
            (identifier_pattern
              (identifier)))
          body: (expr_body
            (function_call_pnc_expr
              caller: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              args: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              args: (const
                (int))
              args: (variable_expr
                (identifier))))))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (const
        (int)))))

================================================================================
function_nested
================================================================================
a= f( a, b(a, b))
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (function_call_pnc_expr
        caller: (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        args: (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        args: (function_call_pnc_expr
          caller: (variable_expr
            (identifier))
          args: (variable_expr
            (identifier))
          args: (variable_expr
            (identifier)))))))

================================================================================
function_with_match
================================================================================
main=
  (|lvl|
      match lvl {
          1 => Stdout.line( "You're running this in a root shell!")
          n => Stdout.line("Your current shell level")
      })

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (parenthesized_expr
        expression: (expr_body
          (anon_fun_expr
            args: (argument_patterns
              (identifier_pattern
                (identifier)))
            body: (expr_body
              (match_expr
                (match)
                (variable_expr
                  (identifier))
                branch: (match_branch
                  pattern: (const_pattern
                    (int))
                  (fat_arrow)
                  expr: (expr_body
                    (function_call_pnc_expr
                      caller: (variable_expr
                        (module)
                        (identifier))
                      args: (const
                        (string)))))
                branch: (match_branch
                  pattern: (identifier_pattern
                    (identifier))
                  (fat_arrow)
                  expr: (expr_body
                    (function_call_pnc_expr
                      caller: (variable_expr
                        (module)
                        (identifier))
                      args: (const
                        (string)))))))))))))

================================================================================
function_lambda_simple
================================================================================
a=|_| a
a=| _ | a
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (wildcard_pattern))
        body: (expr_body
          (variable_expr
            (identifier))))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (wildcard_pattern))
        body: (expr_body
          (variable_expr
            (identifier)))))))

================================================================================
function_field
================================================================================
a= a.bb( a, a)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (function_call_pnc_expr
        caller: (field_access_expr
          target: (variable_expr
            (identifier))
          (identifier))
        args: (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        args: (variable_expr
          (identifier))))))

================================================================================
function_same_line
================================================================================
a= html("<div>")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (function_call_pnc_expr
        caller: (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        args: (const
          (string))))))

================================================================================
function_same_line_long
================================================================================
myHtml=html(hi)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (function_call_pnc_expr
        caller: (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        args: (variable_expr
          (identifier))))))

================================================================================
function_block_body
================================================================================
add = |a, b| {
    result = a + b
    result
}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier))
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (body_expression
            (value_declaration
              (decl_left
                (identifier_pattern
                  (identifier)))
              body: (expr_body
                (bin_op_expr
                  part: (variable_expr
                    (identifier))
                  part: (operator)
                  part: (variable_expr
                    (identifier)))))
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))))))))

====
function_effectful
====
main! =||{
	Stdout.line!("Hello, world!")
	StdoutAlias.line!("Hello, world! (using alias)")

	Stdout.line!(Str.inspect(number_operators(10, 5)))
	print!(boolean_operators(Bool.True, Bool.False))
  }
----

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        body: (expr_body
          (body_expression
            (function_call_pnc_expr
              caller: (variable_expr
                (module)
                (identifier))
              args: (const
                (string)))
            (function_call_pnc_expr
              caller: (variable_expr
                (module)
                (identifier))
              args: (const
                (string)))
            (function_call_pnc_expr
              caller: (variable_expr
                (module)
                (identifier))
              args: (function_call_pnc_expr
                caller: (variable_expr
                  (module)
                  (identifier))
                args: (function_call_pnc_expr
                  caller: (variable_expr
                    (identifier))
                  args: (const
                    (int))
                  args: (const
                    (int)))))
            (function_call_pnc_expr
              caller: (variable_expr
                (identifier))
              args: (function_call_pnc_expr
                caller: (variable_expr
                  (identifier))
                args: (tag_expr
                  (tag
                    (module)
                    (identifier)))
                args: (tag_expr
                  (tag
                    (module)
                    (identifier)))))))))))

===
function_string_static_dispatch
===
a={
  test.hi("")
  print!("One".concat(" Two"))
  }
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (body_expression
        (function_call_pnc_expr
          caller: (field_access_expr
            target: (variable_expr
              (identifier))
            (identifier))
          args: (const
            (string)))
        (function_call_pnc_expr
          caller: (variable_expr
            (identifier))
          args: (function_call_pnc_expr
            caller: (field_access_expr
              target: (const
                (string))
              (identifier))
            args: (const
              (string))))))))
